<a name="BrowserOpener"></a>
## type [BrowserOpener](<https://github.com/tagoro9/fotin-go/blob/main/internal/io/browser.go#L10-L12>)

BrowserOpener is an interface for opening URLs in a browser.

```go
type BrowserOpener interface {
    Open(url string) error
}
```

<a name="DefaultEditor"></a>
## type [DefaultEditor](<https://github.com/tagoro9/fotin-go/blob/main/internal/io/editor.go#L23-L30>)

DefaultEditor implements Editor using the system's default editor as defined by the $EDITOR environment variable.

```go
type DefaultEditor struct {
    // EditorEnvVar is the name of the environment variable to check
    // for the editor command. Defaults to "EDITOR".
    EditorEnvVar string
    // FallbackEditor is the editor to use if the environment variable
    // is not set. Defaults to "vi".
    FallbackEditor string
}
```

<a name="NewDefaultEditor"></a>
### func [NewDefaultEditor](<https://github.com/tagoro9/fotin-go/blob/main/internal/io/editor.go#L33>)

```go
func NewDefaultEditor() *DefaultEditor
```

NewDefaultEditor creates a new DefaultEditor instance with sensible defaults.

<a name="DefaultEditor.Edit"></a>
### func \(\*DefaultEditor\) [Edit](<https://github.com/tagoro9/fotin-go/blob/main/internal/io/editor.go#L59>)

```go
func (e *DefaultEditor) Edit(content string) (string, error)
```

Edit opens the configured editor with the given content in a temporary file. When the editor is closed, the modified content is read and returned.

<a name="Editor"></a>
## type [Editor](<https://github.com/tagoro9/fotin-go/blob/main/internal/io/editor.go#L13-L19>)

Editor defines an interface for editing text content. This abstraction allows for easy testing by swapping the real editor implementation with a mock.

```go
type Editor interface {
    // Edit opens the editor with the given content and returns
    // the edited content when the editor is closed.
    // Returns an error if the editor cannot be opened or the content
    // cannot be read.
    Edit(content string) (string, error)
}
```

<a name="Message"></a>
## type [Message](<https://github.com/tagoro9/fotin-go/blob/main/internal/io/cli.go#L34-L41>)

Message represents a message in the application

```go
type Message struct {
    Detail  string // Optional detailed information
    Emoji   string // Optional emoji to display
    Message string // The main message content
    // ShowInRawMode bool        // Whether to show in raw mode
    // ShowSpinner bool        // Whether to show a spinner with the message
    Type MessageType // The type of message
}
```

<a name="MessageType"></a>
## type [MessageType](<https://github.com/tagoro9/fotin-go/blob/main/internal/io/cli.go#L24>)

MessageType defines the type of message

```go
type MessageType string
```

<a name="MessageTypeError"></a>

```go
const (
    MessageTypeError   MessageType = "error"
    MessageTypeInfo    MessageType = "info"
    MessageTypeRequest MessageType = "request"
    MessageTypeStatus  MessageType = "status"
)
```

<a name="MockEditor"></a>
## type [MockEditor](<https://github.com/tagoro9/fotin-go/blob/main/internal/io/editor.go#L101-L113>)

MockEditor implements Editor for testing purposes. It can be configured to return predefined content or errors.

```go
type MockEditor struct {

    // ReturnContent is the content to return from Edit calls.
    ReturnContent string
    // ReturnError is the error to return from Edit calls (if any).
    ReturnError error
    // ReceivedContent records the content passed to the last Edit call.
    ReceivedContent string
    // EditCalls counts how many times Edit was called.
    EditCalls int
    // EditHistory records all content passed to Edit calls.
    EditHistory []string
    // contains filtered or unexported fields
}
```

<a name="NewMockEditor"></a>
### func [NewMockEditor](<https://github.com/tagoro9/fotin-go/blob/main/internal/io/editor.go#L116>)

```go
func NewMockEditor() *MockEditor
```

NewMockEditor creates a new MockEditor instance.

<a name="MockEditor.Edit"></a>
### func \(\*MockEditor\) [Edit](<https://github.com/tagoro9/fotin-go/blob/main/internal/io/editor.go#L123>)

```go
func (e *MockEditor) Edit(content string) (string, error)
```

Edit records the input content and returns the configured content/error.

<a name="MockEditor.GetEditCalls"></a>
### func \(\*MockEditor\) [GetEditCalls](<https://github.com/tagoro9/fotin-go/blob/main/internal/io/editor.go#L164>)

```go
func (e *MockEditor) GetEditCalls() int
```

GetEditCalls returns the number of times Edit was called.

<a name="MockEditor.GetEditHistory"></a>
### func \(\*MockEditor\) [GetEditHistory](<https://github.com/tagoro9/fotin-go/blob/main/internal/io/editor.go#L171>)

```go
func (e *MockEditor) GetEditHistory() []string
```

<a name="MockEditor.GetReceivedContent"></a>

```go
func (e *MockEditor) GetReceivedContent() string
```

GetReceivedContent returns the content from the last Edit call.

```go
func (e *MockEditor) Reset()
```

Reset clears all recorded state and resets configuration.

```go
func (e *MockEditor) SetError(err error)
```
